fixes: MEDIUM: health endpoint URL matching — fixed to handle query strings and trailing slashes
LOW: test coverage for model=null path added

findings.title: Health endpoint information disclosure
findings.description: Health endpoint exposes provider, model, version, uptime. Acceptable for localhost CLI proxy but worth noting.

findings.title: GitHub Actions pinned to mutable version tags
findings.description: actions/checkout@v4 and actions/setup-node@v4 use mutable tags. Consider pinning to SHAs.

findings.title: CI workflow fragility if dependencies added
findings.description: npm install skipped because zero dependencies. Future contributors adding deps may be confused.

findings.title: No npm publish provenance
findings.description: npm publish without --provenance flag. Consumers cannot verify package origin.

findings.title: Health endpoint exposes package version
findings.description: Standard for open-source CLI tools. Version already public on npm/GitHub.
